Class ChipsViewContainer

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane
com.dlsc.gemsfx.ChipsViewContainer
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class ChipsViewContainer extends javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane
A container used for displaying several ChipView instances. This view is usually used in combination with a parent filter view (e.g. SimpleFilterView). The view also manages a hyperlink for clearing the current selection settings iin the parent view. The view manages its own visibility based on whether there are any chip views to show or not.
See Also:
  • chipsProperty()
  • SimpleFilterView.chipsProperty()
